g.text: PerWrite Mode = iota // fsync every write
Batched // fsync every N or M

div.p: The fsync() cost is a physical constraint — forcing a disk head or NAND controller to commit (1-30ms).

ul.li: NVMe: ~0.5ms | SSD: ~2ms | HDD: ~15ms per fsync operation. Batching amortizes this cost: 1000 messages with 1 fsync = 0.002ms overhead per message. REPLICATION IS NOT FSYNC: Un-fsynced data in page cache is lost on power failure, even if replicated.
